characters.description: Ruwen's divine patron remains central to the conflict with her hostile brother.
characters.name: Uru

characters.description: Uru's hostile divine brother remains the power behind the threat to her lands. His agents helped send Ruwen's party into the spirit realm, and his wider invasion plans remain unresolved.
characters.name: Naktos

characters.description: A learned former Black Pyramid ally and void mage who betrayed Ruwen to Naktos. Tremine helped strand the party in the spirit realm, while his present location and full motives remain unknown.
characters.name: Tremine

characters.description: Ruwen's parents are missing. Their location and fate remain unanswered questions when this book begins.
characters.name: Ruwen's parents

characters.description: Uru's newly ascended champion begins trapped in Fractal's spirit-realm dungeon without his interface or ordinary magic. His conspicuously bright spirit attracts danger, yet he chooses to save a mutilated house captain who had helped attack him and leads the companions already at his side.
characters.name: Ruwen Starfield

characters.description: Ruwen's healer companion remains with the trapped party in Fractal's damaged spirit-realm dungeon while ordinary abilities are unavailable. The companions are still seeking the two hostile men who disappeared.
characters.name: Hamma

characters.description: Ruwen's fighter companion and step-form teacher can unintentionally draw visible spirit from him. This makes Ruwen's exposed spirit harder to conceal while the group searches for a way out.
characters.name: Sift

characters.description: Sift's stealth-fighter companion remains with his group inside Fractal's spirit-realm dungeon. The trapped party is searching for two missing enemies while its interfaces and ordinary magic remain unavailable.
characters.name: Restored shade companion

characters.description: Ruwen's sentient dungeon is weakened by recent events. Fractal shelters the trapped group during its effort to locate two absent enemies.
characters.name: Fractal

characters.description: The bodyguard of Ruwen's missing bully participated in earlier attempts on Ruwen's life. Ruwen finds him mutilated but conscious in Fractal's dungeon and elects to save him despite their history.
characters.name: House captain

characters.description: A hostile mage and former tormentor who is missing inside Fractal's dungeon. Despite this enemy's role in past attacks, Ruwen resolves to recover him.
characters.name: Former hostile mage

characters.description: A dead former assassin of Naktos restored inside Fractal's dungeon. He shows little awareness but follows Ruwen's commands and travels with the escape party.
characters.name: Restored assassin

characters.description: Ruwen's soulbound sentient adviser and memory-indexer. She warns that spirit-feeding creatures can target him and guides him in condensing his spirit before he leaves the dungeon.
characters.name: Soulbound adviser

characters.description: Ruwen's sentient dagger communicates with his soulbound adviser through vibrations, and she can access its memories. Spirit-feeding creatures can target the weapon.
characters.name: Sentient dagger

characters.description: A spatial mage among four armored strangers driven into Fractal's dungeon. Micah recognizes that distortion from Ruwen's core makes him a beacon to dangerous spirit-realm creatures and identifies himself as one of Uru's stranded champions.
characters.name: Micah

characters.description: The woman leading a stranded group of four, three of whom serve Uru. Her group believes Ruwen may be able to take them home, making the champions potential allies in his escape.
characters.name: Uru champion leader

characters.description: A shield-bearing champion aligned with Naktos who travels with the three champions of Uru. Despite his different divine allegiance, he remains part of the stranded group seeking passage home.
characters.name: Naktos-aligned shield bearer

characters.description: The third Uru-aligned member of the four stranded champions. This champion belongs to the group asking Ruwen to take them home, a request he has not yet accepted.
characters.name: Remaining Uru champion

characters.description: Ruwen's soulbound sentient library and mental-training aid. It searches stored knowledge and verifies the identities of Uru's stranded champions before Ruwen accepts them into his party.
characters.name: Bookworm talisman

characters.description: An infernal dreadlord occupying the mine route, protected by formidable fortification and accompanied by affliction wolves. Her face-horns can inject poison and drain essence from victims.
characters.name: Plague siren

characters.description: A tiny female turtle found imprisoned beneath the plague siren's throne. Sift feels responsible for freeing her, though neither her identity nor the reason for her captivity is yet clear.
characters.name: Shelly

characters.description: A Sky Clan spirit entity who recognizes the projected Scarecrow aspect and accuses its wearer of crimes under tribunal law. Peacock identifies the projection as a tribunal target.
characters.name: Peacock

characters.description: The Leaf Clan judge presiding over the tribunal inquiry into crimes associated with the Scarecrow aspect. Willow hears the evidence and oversees Ruwen's attempt to secure lawful passage without exposing his core.
characters.name: Willow

characters.description: The name Ruwen uses before the spirit-realm tribunal while defending his possession of the Scarecrow aspect. As Reaper, he invokes single combat to avoid a core examination that would expose his concealed nature.
characters.name: Reaper

characters.description: The ancient power revered by the tribunal as the Companion. Blapy arrives with senior Black Pyramid figures during Ruwen's hearing and receives exceptional reverence from the assembled cultivators.
characters.name: Blapy

characters.description: Sift's two senior Black Pyramid relatives arrive at the tribunal as clan authorities alongside Blapy. Their presence connects Sift's family to the proceedings around Ruwen's challenge.
characters.name: Sift's senior clan relatives

characters.description: The Sky Clan leader who replaces Peacock as Ruwen's challenger. Phoenix agrees to a timed duel whose result will determine whether the traveler called Reaper may cross tribunal lands unharmed.
characters.name: Phoenix

characters.description: A powerful water-bodied creature guarding the lake beside the portal flowers. Tickles destroys Ruwen's projected double and makes approaching a usable iris extremely dangerous.
characters.name: Tickles

characters.description: A noncombatant panther scout summoned from Ruwen's Watcher's Ring of Travel and named by Sift. Ruwen sends Whiskers to survey the empty Grey Canyon around the suspected temple site.
characters.name: Whiskers

characters.description: Hamma's absent father becomes an active concern when Blapy offers to disclose his location.
characters.name: Hamma's father

characters.description: The restored shade companion's brother remains imprisoned in the Legion vault. Learning that his own emergency contributed to an abandoned rescue attempt makes Ruwen recognize a debt to both siblings.
characters.name: Shade companion's brother

characters.description: A level-30 undead mage occupying the ruined city with a large skeleton force. The bone sculptor kills an approaching scout, claims the city as forbidden ground, and blocks the party's access to Uru's dormant temple.
characters.name: Bone sculptor

characters.description: A dangerous golem bound to Hamma from the recovered equipment. Smash attacks everyone except its owner when activated, making it both a powerful weapon and a threat to her allies.
characters.name: Smash

characters.description: The operational mind of Uru's third temple. It requests current dimensional and temporal coordinates from Ruwen and resumes the temple's restoration after his soulbound adviser establishes a way to communicate with it.
characters.name: Third temple intelligence

characters.description: The committed partner of a foreign champion serving Isaac. Their divine pact prevents the pair from remaining together openly in Uru’s realm.
characters.name: Una

characters.description: Isaac’s champion enters Uru’s realm to remain with Una despite a divine pact that prevents them from staying together openly. He permits Lillan’s coin to store his spirit-realm memories until a designated phrase restores them.
characters.name: Isaac’s foreign champion
